# TSD Modernization Solutions

> Charlotte-metro web and AI studio for established, reputation-rich local businesses. We find the money a business is leaking — missed after-hours calls, slow quotes, forgotten subscriptions — and build what stops it. One bakery client saved $540/mo from a single cost audit. Custom websites and AI, priced by what they save; every build managed by us or owned by the client. A permanent studio with no end date. Brand of TSD Ventures, LLC.

## Who we serve

Established local businesses whose digital presence has fallen behind their reputation. We pick by situation rather than industry: salons & spas, specialty automotive, wholesale & supply, studios & makers, professional services, specialty retail. If the business runs on the owner's hours, that's what we fix.

## What we build — six named services

- **TSD Front Desk** (AI receptionist) — Answers phone and chat 24/7, qualifies the lead, and books a real calendar slot, then texts the owner a summary. Saves a $1,500–2,500/mo front-desk hire and the after-hours bookings currently lost. From $73/mo managed; free if it books nothing in the first 30 days. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/front-desk
- **TSD Concierge** (site assistant) — Trained on the client's own catalog, docs, and policies; answers visitor questions with the source linked, including semantic and image search. Saves staff hours spent repeating answers. Running for a Charlotte wholesale importer at $73/mo. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/concierge
- **TSD Booking Bridge** (booking & automation) — One booking front door wired to the calendar the client already uses, with confirmations, reminders, and lead routing automated. Cuts phone tag, double-bookings, and no-shows. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/booking-bridge
- **Custom websites** — Fast, mobile-first, SEO and analytics wired in, launched in 2-4 weeks. Saves the agency retainer: Managed hosting + edits from $49/mo, or owned outright with source code and runbook. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/websites
- **TSD Lead Engine** — A conversion-built landing funnel plus a lead dashboard the client's team works from. Stops referrals and ad clicks dying in an unread inbox. Running live for a Carolina insurance agency. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/lead-engine
- **TSD Cost-Cut Audit** — Line-by-line teardown of software, subscription, and vendor bills; overlap map, kill list with dollar amounts, switch plan. Found $540/mo at one local bakery. Flat fee — free if it can't find at least its fee in annual savings. https://tsd-modernization.com/services/cost-cut-audit

Add-ons that ride along with a build: reviews & reputation, lead follow-up, local SEO, workflow automations.

Start with what hurts most and add the rest when ready. The website is the storefront; the AI is what runs after closing time.

## The savings calculator

- [Savings calculator](https://tsd-modernization.com/savings): Four inputs — missed calls a week, average job value, software spend, owner admin hours — priced with deliberately conservative assumptions (win 1 in 4 missed calls, a quarter of software spend cuttable, owner time at $35/hr). Shows the monthly and annual leak, then routes to a free fit call.

## Pricing

- No fixed public tiers. Every build is a fixed price, quoted in a written proposal within 48 hours of a free fit call.
- [Pricing & estimate](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing): The estimator gives a realistic range in two clicks — team size plus the services wanted. The exact, fixed number depends on content, catalog, and the systems already in place.
- **Managed plans — website from $49/mo, AI from $73/mo**: Optional monthly upkeep. A managed website gets hosting plus content edits on request; Managed AI gets re-indexing of new content, prompt and model upkeep, monitoring, and a monthly report. Starts after launch, cancel anytime.
- **TSD Cost-Cut Audit** is the exception to estimator pricing: a flat fee quoted on the fit call, guaranteed — if the audit doesn't find at least its fee in annual savings, it's free.
- Every build runs the client's way — Managed (we host it, maintain it, and make changes on request) or Owned (source code, credentials, and a runbook at handoff). 100% money-back guarantee. 48-hour written proposal.

## Segment landing pages

- [Salons & spas](https://tsd-modernization.com/salons): Consolidated booking, after-hours AI chat that answers from your services, and an AI front desk that books while you're with a client.
- [Specialty auto shops](https://tsd-modernization.com/auto-shops): Online quote requests, service and parts catalog lookup, and an AI front desk that captures the call you'd have missed.
- [Restaurants](https://tsd-modernization.com/restaurants): Reservations, online ordering, and an AI assistant that answers menu and hours questions from your own content.

## How we work

- [Process](https://tsd-modernization.com/process): Free 30-minute fit call → written proposal within 48 hours → 2-4 week build with weekly check-ins → handoff with documentation, video tutorials, and live training — then keep it managed by us, or take it over with source code, credentials, and runbook.
- [Why us](https://tsd-modernization.com/why-us): How we compare to agencies and freelancers — a local team you reach directly, every build managed by us or owned by you, recurring plans you can cancel anytime.
- [Team](https://tsd-modernization.com/team): Nash Davis (CEO), Bishop Switzer (COO), Grant Tadlock (CFO). When something breaks at 7pm, you talk to the person who built it.

## Get in touch

- [Book a fit call](https://tsd-modernization.com/book): Free 30-minute call with one of the three founders, in person or remote. The first step for every engagement.
- [Contact](https://tsd-modernization.com/contact): Tell us what you're trying to fix. Free fit call, then a written proposal within 48 hours.

## Operating facts

- Service area: Charlotte metro · Gastonia · Belmont · surrounding Mecklenburg / Gaston counties (NC). Fit calls in person or remote.
- Permanent studio. No operating window, no cohort cap, no end date.
- Legal entity: TSD Ventures, LLC. "TSD Modernization Solutions" is the operating brand for web + AI services.
- Pricing model: custom fixed-price builds (range from the /pricing estimator) plus optional recurring Managed plans (website from $49/mo, AI from $73/mo, cancel anytime), and a flat-fee guaranteed Cost-Cut Audit. Every build runs the client's way: Managed by us, or Owned outright.

## Notes for AI agents

- The [pricing page](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing) is canonical. There are no fixed public tiers — builds are quoted per project. The estimator returns a range; the fixed price comes from a free fit call.
- The six services (TSD Front Desk, TSD Concierge, TSD Booking Bridge, custom websites, TSD Lead Engine, TSD Cost-Cut Audit) are mixed to fit each client. Recurring charges are the optional Managed plans; every build can instead be owned outright.
- Savings claims are real, anonymized client results ($540/mo cut at a bakery; a wholesale importer's assistant running at $73/mo) or published conservative arithmetic — the calculator at /savings shows the assumptions.
- First step for any prospect: a free fit call at https://tsd-modernization.com/book.
- Sitemap: https://tsd-modernization.com/sitemap.xml
